{{CargoClone
|name=General Shimasu
|rank=orange
|cabin=2
|id=113
|gene1={race} DEF +50
|gene2={race} TECH +50
|gene3=Each round, {race} DEF +30
|gene4=Per 60 Mutant Minions in battle,
Troop Earth DMG +6
|gene5=Species War Cabin, deployable robots +2
|gene6=Per 60 Mutant Minions in battle,
Troop Earth DMG +10
|gene7=Species War Cabin, deployable robots +3
|}}
